title: Colours & modes
text: Light base theme — bg, fg, primary set bslib variables inst/pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml, bslib derives full gray ramp . Dark mode rides Bootstrap 5.3 colour modes. pkgdown’s light switch (light-switch: true) toggles data-bs-theme attribute page, theme overrides relevant CSS custom properties [data-bs-theme="dark"] inst/pkgdown/extra.scss: everything keys CSS custom properties, components reference var(--bs-primary) var(--bs-border-color) adapt automatically — duplicated component rules per mode.

title: Theme showcase
text: normal paragraph body text set Inter. mixes emphasis, strong emphasis, link pkgdown, bit inline_code() show muted-blue code chip. Headings set Outfit slightly tightened letter-spacing sleeker feel. Blockquotes get muted-blue accent bar left, reads cleanly light -white dark navy backgrounds.

title: Theme showcase
text: Fenced code blocks framed rounded border matches rest page. token colours come arrow-light / nord syntax themes, track active colour mode: non-evaluated block, show pure syntax highlighting:
code: # A short, plain example nums <- rnorm(100, mean = 5, sd = 2) summary(nums) #>    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max.  #> -0.2247  4.2878  5.1821  5.1416  6.2468 10.5108 fit <- lm(mpg ~ wt + cyl, data = mtcars) coef(summary(fit))

title: Theme showcase

what: Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
title: Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
text: pkgdown template package gives documentation site sleek, muted-blue look first-class light dark colour modes. bundles coordinated type scale, light/dark syntax-highlighting pair, component styling.

title: Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
text: Muted-blue palette — calm steel-blue (#3f6f9f) primary faintly cool -white light mode, brighter airy blue (#7ea8d6) deep muted navy dark mode. Light + dark modes via pkgdown’s light switch (Bootstrap 5.3 colour modes). toggle appears navbar; code highlighting swaps arrow-light nord match. Typography — Inter body text, Outfit headings, JetBrains Mono code (bundled build time, CDN needed view time). Polished components — rounded, framed code blocks; accent-bar TOC links; subtle blurred navbar border; tidy tables, buttons, focus rings.

title: Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
text: consuming package’s _pkgdown.yml: pkgdown find template building site (e.g. CI), add DESCRIPTION:

title: Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
Muted-Blue pkgdown Template with Light and Dark Modes
text: Colours, fonts, Bootstrap variables live inst/pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml template.bslib. Layout component styling — including entire dark colour mode [data-bs-theme="dark"] — lives inst/pkgdown/extra.scss. consuming package can override single value setting locally _pkgdown.yml; local keys win template’s.
